nasb.text: He built altars in the house of the Lord, of which the Lord had said, “In Jerusalem I will put My name.”

esv.text: And he built altars in the house of the Lord, of which the Lord had said, “In Jerusalem will I put my name.”

cnv.text: 他又在耶和華的殿內建造祭壇，耶和華曾指著這殿說：“我要立我的名在耶路撒冷。”

ccb.text: 耶和华曾指着祂的殿说：“我的名必在耶路撒冷”，而他却在耶和华的殿内建造异教的祭坛。
